title: Roads 'n' Vehicles
description: A small road decor mod, that adds asphalt (with and without markings), guardrails, delineators and a whole bunch of European and a few American style street signs.
body:
![Update Logo](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/roads-n-vehicles-title.png)

*"A small road decor mod, that adds asphalt (with and without markings), traffic lights, a fire hydrant, guardrails, delineators and a whole bunch of European style street signs, complient with the Vienna Convention on Road Signs and Signals, aswell as a few American signs, that aren't."*

![A street example build in the Overworld with many of the new decorative blocks being visable.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoVPWcRe/images/abfa267292cea47a7e9f2eb2313879cd75d998d8.png)

# About

[![TLOTD Icon](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/tlotd_made.png)](https://tlotd.net)
[![Isla_Nublar Icon](https://tlotd.net/minecraft/mod/isla_nublar_made.png)](https://isla-nublar.com)

This mod adds all kinds of Asphalt, Line Markings, Signs in all shapes and forms, construction warning lights, pylons, a fire hydrant and in 1.20.1 even 2 muscle cars, the Firecharge and the Stallion. This mod has Minecraft styled textures, varying between 16x and 32x resolution. Main drive for creating this mod was the lack of road decor that actually fit the Minecraft aesthetic, as too many are highly realistic with 256x textures and I thought these don't look very pleasent.

## Q & A
Q: Is this project open source?
A: Yes the full source code is available over on Github.

Q: Am I allowed to include this mod in my modpack?
A: Sure, just credit it somewhere.

Q: The Mod is not available in my native language, what can I do?
A: You could help the Project by providing a translation over on Github.

## Supported Projects

| Supported Project | Project Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [![The Wonder of Ponder Logo](https://tlotd.net/wiki/mc-mod/assets/the-wonder-of-ponder.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-wonder-of-ponder) | **[The Wonder of Ponder](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-wonder-of-ponder)** | **Mod** | _Adds the pondering system from the Create mod to many Blocks & Items from TLOTD mods._ |
| [![TLOTD Logo](https://tlotd.net/wiki/mc-mod/assets/tlotd.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tlotd) | **[TLOTD](https://modrinth.com/mod/roads-n-vehicles)** | **Mod** | _Adds new progression, aswell as a magic and tech system, changing a few crafting recipies of Roads 'n' Vehicles along the way._ |

# Images
## New decorative & functional building blocks
![All Blocks included in the Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoVPWcRe/images/a11d8416e33f48aad72326430aa566be14146978.png)
The Mod includes almost 100 unique blocks to decorate your world with. From simple signs to traffic lights and fire hydrants.

## Two vehicles included
![A player duo meeting another player in their ride](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XoVPWcRe/images/8eab20701444faedf687d9fe01bf55bf791408b8.png)
The mod is fully playable in both creative and survival. It features not just decoration, but also 2 new rides for 2 players to take. (Think camels but faster, think boats but on land)
